PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 12, 2006, and codicils dated December 16, 2008, December 23, 2009, and September 13, 2011 is admitted to probate. Jerome E. Cahill is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 30, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Barrett: Not reported.
